80 for Brady (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $39,448,525Details
International Box Office $935,502
Worldwide Box Office $40,384,027
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,312,483
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $994,300
Total $3,306,783
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Four best friends live life to the fullest when they take a wild trip to the 2017 Super Bowl LI to see their hero Tom Brady play.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,701,640 (32.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.11 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:97.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,912 opening theaters/3,939 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $43,126,540

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 3rd, 2023 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: March 24th, 2023 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
April 20th, 2023 (Wide), released as Brady's Ladies (Germany)
April 27th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
April 27th, 2023 (Wide) (New Zealand)
Video Release: March 7th, 2023 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for brief strong language, some drug content and some suggestive references.
(Rating bulletin 2765 (cert #54114), 1/11/2023)
Running Time: 98 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Filming location (state or county): California, United States
Plot point: Autumn Years, Football, Road Trip
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Sports Comedy
Time period setting: 2010s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 199 Productions, Fifth Season
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
